name: Candied Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pecans in a 13x9x2-inch baking pan. Heat in a 250 F. oven for 5 minutes.
2. Melt butter in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat. Stir in corn syrup and half the sugar. Stirring constantly, bring to a boil; boil without stirring for 5 minutes.
3. Pour syrup over nuts, stirring constantly to coat evenly. Return to baking pan and bake in a 250 F. oven for 1 hour, stirring several times.
4. Sprinkle nuts with remaining 1/4 cup sugar, tossing to coat evenly. Spread out on greased cookie sheets to cool.
5. Quickly separate into individual pecan halves; allow to cool completely.
6. Store in a tightly covered container.
